color_profiles.name: chalcedony-blue
color_profiles.cause: Rayleigh scattering of light through the microporous fibrous structure.

color_profiles.name: chrysoprase
color_profiles.cause: Nickel (as nickeloan talc or willemseite) imparting green.

color_profiles.name: onyx
color_profiles.cause: Parallel straight bands; black from carbon or manganese inclusions.

color_profiles.name: bloodstone
color_profiles.cause: Green from chlorite inclusions; red spots from iron oxide (hematite/jasper).

visual_notes: Characteristic waxy luster on polished surfaces. Translucent with a faint glow in thin sections. Smooth, ghost-like quality distinguishes it from coarse quartz.

optical_effects.fluorescence: Variable; some specimens weakly fluorescent under UV.
optical_effects.chatoyancy: Weak; fibrous varieties can show faint cat's eye in cabochon cut.
